questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Bertelsmann Music Group and/or Concord.

Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Merger on competition, including if Bertelsmann Music Group and Concord are close competitors and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Merger.
